name: Global Uniques
uniques: Provides [1] [War Support] <when at war> <when number of [War Support] is less than [100]>
Provides [-1] [War Support] <when not at war> <when number of [War Support] is more than [0]>
Provides [-1] [War Support] <when below [0] [Happiness]> <when at war> <when number of [War Support] is more than [0]>
Provides [-1] [War Support] <when below [-10] [Happiness]> <when at war> <when number of [War Support] is more than [0]>
Provides [1] [War Support] <when above [10] [Happiness]> <when at war> <when number of [War Support] is more than [0]>
Instantly provides [1] [War Support] <for every [-[War Support]]> <when number of [War Support] is less than [0]>
Instantly consumes [1] [War Support] <for every [[War Support]-100]> <when number of [War Support] is more than [100]>
[Warrior] units gain the [Consumption on Action Warrior] promotion
[Archer] units gain the [Consumption on Action Archer] promotion
